column1: # Scenario catalog. Pipe-separated (|): proxy/scenario | description | paths | short
# `paths` is a comma-separated list of URL paths exposed by the proxy on
# http://localhost:9090. Used by run-scenario.sh to build clickable links and
# by scripts/gen-readmes.sh to emit per-scenario README.md files.
# `short` is a one-line tag (≤60 chars) shown in run-scenario.sh's filter list.
# Edit descriptions here; per-scenario READMEs are regenerated from this file.
apache-httpd/http/root-context | App at /, proxy at /. Baseline scenario using a single <Location /> block with upgrade=websocket. | / | App and proxy at /, baseline single <Location />

apache-httpd/http/root-context-legacy | Same as root-context but using the pre-Apache 2.4.47 RewriteRule style to upgrade WebSocket connections, kept for comparison with older configs. | / | Pre-2.4.47 RewriteRule WebSocket upgrade style

apache-httpd/http/root-context-push-url | root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; needs an extra ws:// proxy block for the relocated PUSH endpoint. | / | root-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push
apache-httpd/http/custom-context | App on /app context, proxy preserves the same path so the backend sees the original URL unchanged. | /app/ | App on /app context, proxy preserves path

apache-httpd/http/custom-context-push-url | custom-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a dedicated WebSocket proxy rule for the relocated PUSH endpoint. | /app/ | custom-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/http/root-to-custom-context | Proxy at /, app on /app context. The public URL stays at root and the proxy adds the /app prefix when forwarding to the backend's custom context. | / | Proxy at /, app on /app (proxy adds /app prefix)

apache-httpd/http/root-to-custom-context-push-url | root-to-custom-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a ws:// proxy block for /VAADIN/push that maps to the backend's /app/VAADIN/push. | / | root-to-custom-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/http/custom-to-root-context | Proxy at /app/, app at root /. The public URL adds an /app prefix that the proxy strips before forwarding to the backend root. | /app/ | Proxy at /app/, app at / (proxy strips /app prefix)

apache-httpd/http/custom-to-root-context-push-url | custom-to-root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a ws:// proxy block for /app/VAADIN/push that maps to the backend's /VAADIN/push. | /app/ | custom-to-root-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/http/custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping | Proxy at /app/ui/, app at root / with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy strips the /app prefix and forwards to the backend; /app/ui/HILLA and /app/ui/connect are rewritten to /HILLA and /connect on the backend (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The catch-all carries root-level static resources. | /app/ui/ | Proxy at /app/ui/, app at /, Vaadin servlet on /ui/*

apache-httpd/http/root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping | Proxy at /ui/, app on /app context with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The public URL drops the /app prefix; the proxy prepends /app when forwarding to the backend. /ui/HILLA and /ui/connect are rewritten to /app/HILLA and /app/connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The catch-all carries root-level static resources. | /ui/ | Proxy at /ui/, app on /app, Vaadin servlet on /ui/*

apache-httpd/http/servlet-mapping | App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*. /HILLA/* (Hilla push) and /connect/* (Hilla browser-callables) live at the context root, so the proxy rewrites /ui/HILLA/* and /ui/connect/* back to /HILLA/* and /connect/*. Root-level static resources flow through the catch-all. | /ui/ | Vaadin servlet on /ui/*, Hilla resources at root
apache-httpd/http/servlet-mapping-push-url | servlet-mapping with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push. | /ui/ | servlet-mapping with PUSH at /VAADIN/push
apache-httpd/http/load-balancer | Two backends balanced by mod_proxy_balancer with sticky sessions via Tomcat jvmRoute appended to JSESSIONID. | / | Two HTTP backends, sticky via Tomcat jvmRoute
apache-httpd/ajp/root-context | App at /, proxied over AJP (mod_proxy_ajp) instead of HTTP. | / | App at /, proxied over AJP

apache-httpd/ajp/root-context-push-url | AJP root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; PUSH still needs an HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames. | / | AJP root-context, PUSH at /VAADIN/push (ws via HTTP)
apache-httpd/ajp/custom-context | App on /app context, proxied over AJP preserving the path. | /app/ | AJP, app on /app context, proxy preserves path
apache-httpd/ajp/custom-context-push-url | AJP custom-context with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push. | /app/ | AJP custom-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/ajp/root-to-custom-context | AJP proxy at /, app on /app context. The proxy adds the /app prefix when forwarding to the backend's custom context. PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames. | / | AJP proxy at /, app on /app (proxy adds /app prefix)

apache-httpd/ajp/root-to-custom-context-push-url | AJP root-to-custom-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a ws:// proxy block for /VAADIN/push that maps to the backend's /app/VAADIN/push. | / | AJP root-to-custom-context, PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/ajp/custom-to-root-context | AJP proxy at /app/, app at root /. The proxy strips the /app prefix before forwarding to the backend root. PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames. | /app/ | AJP proxy at /app/, app at / (strips /app prefix)

apache-httpd/ajp/custom-to-root-context-push-url | AJP custom-to-root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a ws:// proxy block for /app/VAADIN/push that maps to the backend's /VAADIN/push. | /app/ | AJP custom-to-root-context, PUSH at /VAADIN/push

apache-httpd/ajp/custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping | AJP proxy at /app/ui/, app at root / with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy strips the /app prefix and forwards to the backend; /app/ui/HILLA and /app/ui/connect are rewritten to /HILLA and /connect on the backend (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The AJP catch-all carries root-level static resources. | /app/ui/ | AJP proxy at /app/ui/, app at /, Vaadin on /ui/*

apache-httpd/ajp/root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping | AJP proxy at /ui/, app on /app context with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy prepends /app when forwarding to the backend; /ui/HILLA and /ui/connect are rewritten to /app/HILLA and /app/connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The AJP catch-all carries root-level static resources; PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames. | /ui/ | AJP proxy at /ui/, app on /app, Vaadin on /ui/*

apache-httpd/ajp/servlet-mapping | App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*, proxied over AJP. /HILLA push uses an HTTP/WebSocket proxy; /ui/HILLA/* and /ui/connect/* are rewritten back to /HILLA/* and /connect/* on the backend (Hilla resources live at the context root). Root-level static resources flow through the AJP catch-all. | /ui/ | AJP, Vaadin servlet on /ui/*, Hilla at root
apache-httpd/ajp/servlet-mapping-push-url | AJP servlet-mapping with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push. | /ui/ | AJP servlet-mapping with PUSH at /VAADIN/push
apache-httpd/ajp/load-balancer | Two AJP backends balanced by mod_proxy_balancer with sticky sessions via Tomcat jvmRoute. | / | Two AJP backends, sticky via Tomcat jvmRoute

apache-httpd/https/root-context | App at /, Apache terminates TLS on https://localhost:9443/ and forwards over plain HTTP to the backend. SERVER_FORWARD_HEADERS_STRATEGY=NATIVE so Spring Boot honors X-Forwarded-Proto and Vaadin advertises wss:// for PUSH. | / | TLS at proxy, plain HTTP to backend (XFP)

apache-httpd/ajp-https/root-context | App at /, Apache terminates TLS on https://localhost:9443/ and forwards over AJP. WebSocket upgrades cannot ride AJP and bypass it via a server-scope RewriteRule to ws://. AJP carries the request scheme natively so Tomcat sees request.isSecure()=true. | / | TLS at proxy, AJP to backend, ws bypass

nginx/https/root-context | App at /, NGINX terminates TLS on https://localhost:9443/ and forwards over plain HTTP to the backend. SERVER_FORWARD_HEADERS_STRATEGY=NATIVE so Spring Boot honors X-Forwarded-Proto and Vaadin advertises wss:// for PUSH. | / | NGINX terminates TLS, plain HTTP to backend
nginx/http/root-context | App at /, proxy at /. Baseline NGINX config using the shared default.conf.template with VAADIN_PATH=/. | / | App and proxy at /, NGINX baseline (VAADIN_PATH=/)

nginx/http/root-context-push-url | root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; uses the shared push-url.conf.template that adds a dedicated location for the relocated PUSH endpoint. | / | NGINX root-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push
nginx/http/custom-context | App on /app context, NGINX preserves the path. Uses the shared default.conf.template with VAADIN_PATH=/app. | /app/ | NGINX, app on /app context, proxy preserves path
nginx/http/custom-context-push-url | custom-context with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push. | /app/ | NGINX custom-context with PUSH at /VAADIN/push

nginx/http/root-to-custom-context | NGINX proxy at /, app on /app context. The proxy adds the /app prefix when forwarding to the backend's custom context — scenario-local template with proxy_cookie_path and proxy_redirect adjustments. | / | NGINX proxy at /, app on /app (adds /app prefix)

nginx/http/root-to-custom-context-push-url | root-to-custom-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a dedicated /VAADIN/push location that maps to the backend's /app/VAADIN/push. | / | NGINX root-to-custom-context, PUSH at /VAADIN/push

nginx/http/custom-to-root-context | NGINX proxy at /app/, app at root /. The proxy strips the /app prefix before forwarding to the backend root — scenario-local template handling the path translation. | /app/ | NGINX proxy at /app/, app at / (strips /app prefix)

nginx/http/custom-to-root-context-push-url | custom-to-root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a dedicated /app/VAADIN/push location that maps to the backend's /VAADIN/push. | /app/ | NGINX custom-to-root-context, PUSH at /VAADIN/push

nginx/http/custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping | NGINX proxy at /app/ui/, app at root / with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy strips the /app prefix and forwards to the backend; dedicated /app/ui/HILLA/ and /app/ui/connect/ locations rewrite Hilla resources to /HILLA and /connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The catch-all carries root-level static resources. | /app/ui/ | NGINX proxy at /app/ui/, app at /, Vaadin on /ui/*

nginx/http/root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping | NGINX proxy at /ui/, app on /app context with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy prepends /app when forwarding to the backend; dedicated /ui/HILLA/ and /ui/connect/ locations rewrite Hilla resources to /app/HILLA and /app/connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The catch-all carries root-level static resources. | /ui/ | NGINX proxy at /ui/, app on /app, Vaadin on /ui/*

nginx/http/servlet-mapping | App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*. Scenario-local template rewrites /ui/HILLA/* and /ui/connect/* back to /HILLA/* and /connect/* (Hilla resources live at the context root) and lets the catch-all carry root-level static resources. | /ui/ | NGINX, Vaadin servlet on /ui/*, Hilla at root
nginx/http/servlet-mapping-push-url | servlet-mapping with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push. | /ui/ | NGINX servlet-mapping with PUSH at /VAADIN/push
nginx/http/load-balancer | Two backends balanced by NGINX upstream with sticky sessions via a synthesized ROUTEID cookie. | / | Two backends, NGINX upstream, sticky ROUTEID cookie

nginx/http/multiple-root-context | Two independent app instances, each running at /, exposed by NGINX under different prefixes (/ui1 and /ui2). Per-app session cookie names avoid collisions. | /ui1/,/ui2/ | Two independent apps under /ui1 and /ui2
